summary: Replaced six metric-card grid on title page with a single corpus-table showing all stats in one clean table; all metric-* IDs preserved for live JSON hydration
Re-annotated 662 chapters from clean verse text across 36 books; eliminated all leaked <span class=cw> escaped HTML markup (16,606+ instances). 21,336 verses, 108,531 word entries re-processed.
Covered by same fix as T-0017: all remaining books with leaked escaped cw span markup re-annotated from clean verse text in commit 9c0487e9.
Test was passing once using the correct HTTP server (Python http.server); the serve package was returning 301 redirects. No browser code change needed for search ranking.
Fixed by synchronous verse focus in jumpTo() for already-loaded chapters, and reordering genesis_1_notes.html so first .ref-link in verse 1 points to genesis_1.html#v1.

title: Source Scout: build a dedicated ingest handler that takes a scout-approved ledger task and runs the source through the lds_pipeline so it appears in the library without requiring manual scripting

Source Scout: ingest 'Works of Philo of Alexandria' — copyright=1.00 (trusted archive domain (gutenberg.org)), relevance=0.88 (relevant — 8 keyword matches: scripture, bible, ancient near east, hebrew, theological, greek testament, septuagint, lxx) — URL: https://www.gutenberg.org/files/993/993-0.txt

note: Candidate: Works of Philo of Alexandria | URL: https://www.gutenberg.org/files/993/993-0.txt | copyright=1.00 (trusted archive domain (gutenberg.org)) | relevance=0.88 (relevant — 8 keyword matches: scripture, bible, ancient near east, hebrew, theological, greek testament, septuagint, lxx)

summary: Test task created to validate source_ingestor.py parsing — T-0073 implementation verified

note: source_ingestor.py built and validated via dry-run against T-0074 (test Source Scout task). All 11 pipeline steps pass. Parses scout task titles and notes, gates on copyright/relevance scores, fetches and strips HTML, auto-detects source group, writes to cache, runs build_source_library→build_source_words→build_search_index→build_source_dashboard, then creates a human review task before correlate_embeddings.

summary: Replaced broken stat list and link blob with clean table and separated nav entries

source_ingestor.py built and tested. Takes a scout task ID, gates on scores, fetches+cleans URL, auto-detects group, writes to cache, runs build_source_library→build_source_words→build_search_index→build_source_dashboard, creates a human-review gate before correlate_embeddings, then marks task complete. --dry-run flag available. 11/11 steps verified via dry-run on T-0074.
Fixed mobile word-tap by extending click handler to find nearest child span.w when elementFromPoint returns verse-text container; test now passes

summary: Repaired 1,290 truncated verses across 373 chapters. Root cause: cdfec685 introduced truncated verse HTML; 9c0487e9 re-annotated from it, preserving the truncation. New script repair_truncated_verses.py restores verse text from verse_catalog.json and re-annotates. Post-repair audit: verses_with_truncation=0 (was 1,634).
